# Pull Request

This PR is for Issue #2: Add comprehensive README for OctoAcme Project Management Docs

## Summary
- Adds comprehensive README to `docs/` folder
- Serves as central entry point for all project management processes
- Includes overview, links to all 8 process documents, and quick-start guides
- Addresses acceptance criteria from Issue #2

## Changes
- Created `docs/README.md` with complete project management documentation index
- Includes core philosophy, project lifecycle, and common task workflows
- Direct links to all existing process documents
- Communication cadence and key roles overview

Closes #2
